Chu and written by Winnie Holzman and Dana Fox. The sequel to *Wicked \"Wicked (2024 film)\")* (2024), it adapts the second act of the 2003 stage musical \"Wicked (musical)\") by Stephen Schwartz and Holzman, which was loosely based on Gregory Maguire's 1995 novel \"Wicked (Maguire novel)\"), a re-imagining of L. Set in the Land of Oz before and during the events of *The Wonderful Wizard of Oz*, the film follows Elphaba and Glinda in their new respective identities as the Wicked Witch of the West and Glinda the Good. *Wicked: For Good* premiered at the Suhai Music Hall in São Paulo on November 4, 2025, and was released in the United States on November 21.","score":0.9465623,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.nbc.com/nbc-insider/when-does-wicked-for-good-come-out-release-date-details","title":"When Does Wicked: For Good Come Out?
